<answer>Thank you for confirming. I'm pleased to inform you that the file attachment process for your support case (Case Number: case_num_XYZ) has been successfully initiated. 

The system has confirmed that the file has been successfully attached to your case. This means that the support team will be able to access and review the file you've provided as they work on resolving your network issue.

Here are a few important points to note:

1. The file you've attached is now securely associated with your case.
2. Our support team will review the attached file as part of their investigation into your network problem.
3. If they need any additional information or clarification regarding the attached file, they will contact you through the case communication channels.

Is there anything else you would like to do with your support case? For example:
1. Would you like to attach any additional files?
2. Do you want to add any comments or further information to the case?
3. Would you like to review the current status of your case?

finalResponse.text:
Thank you for confirming. I'm pleased to inform you that the file attachment process for your support case (Case Number: case_num_XYZ) has been successfully initiated. 

The system has confirmed that the file has been successfully attached to your case. This means that the support team will be able to access and review the file you've provided as they work on resolving your network issue.

Here are a few important points to note:

1. The file you've attached is now securely associated with your case.
2. Our support team will review the attached file as part of their investigation into your network problem.
3. If they need any additional information or clarification regarding the attached file, they will contact you through the case communication channels.

Is there anything else you would like to do with your support case? For example:
1. Would you like to attach any additional files?
2. Do you want to add any comments or further information to the case?
3. Would you like to review the current status of your case?

Please let me know if you need any further assistance.

<answer>Certainly! I'd be happy to help you attach a file to your recently created support case (Case Number: case_num_XYZ). Before we proceed, please note the following file attachment guidelines:

Supported file formats include:
- Documents: .csv, .doc, .docx, .dot, .pdf, .ppt, .pptx, .rtf, .txt, .xls, .xlsx
- Images: .bmp, .gif, .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .tif, .tiff
- Other: .js, .mdb, .mp3, .ogg, .wav, .vi, .mov, .mpeg, .mpg, .swf, .gpg, .zip, .css, .htm, .html, .xml, .xsl, .xslt

The maximum file size allowed is 2GB.

To attach a file to your case:

1. Prepare the file you wish to attach, ensuring it meets the format and size requirements.
2. Let me know when you're ready to proceed with the file attachment.
3. I will then initiate the file attachment process, which will provide you with instructions on how to upload your file securely.

finalResponse.text:
Certainly! I'd be happy to help you attach a file to your recently created support case (Case Number: case_num_XYZ). Before we proceed, please note the following file attachment guidelines:

Supported file formats include:
- Documents: .csv, .doc, .docx, .dot, .pdf, .ppt, .pptx, .rtf, .txt, .xls, .xlsx
- Images: .bmp, .gif, .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .tif, .tiff
- Other: .js, .mdb, .mp3, .ogg, .wav, .vi, .mov, .mpeg, .mpg, .swf, .gpg, .zip, .css, .htm, .html, .xml, .xsl, .xslt

The maximum file size allowed is 2GB.

To attach a file to your case:

1. Prepare the file you wish to attach, ensuring it meets the format and size requirements.
2. Let me know when you're ready to proceed with the file attachment.
3. I will then initiate the file attachment process, which will provide you with instructions on how to upload your file securely.

Are you ready to proceed with attaching a file to your case?
